'''Dorvalla IV''' was a world controlled by [[Dorvalla Mining]]. It was the planet beyond their main base, [[Dorvalla/Legends|Dorvalla]]. It was apparently inhabitable by humanoids; whether it actually was is unknown.

In [[34 BBY/Legends|34 BBY]], the crew of [[Arwen Cohl]] wanted to land on Dorvalla IV, but Cohl knew that there were ships under way to [[Dorvalla/Legends|Dorvalla]]. A single shuttle would attract much attention.

{{Planet-stub}}
